comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-002 (medium, acceptance-first). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/check-placeholders-brownfield.tests.sh/.ps1 (14/14 passed both lanes) plus tests/loop-consistency.tests.sh/.ps1 (27/27 passed both lanes, 0 SKIP -- the brownfield-profile leg is green) and the epic-159-pillar-a2 regression set (all green, 0 failed suites). Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build). RESOLVED FINDING: an earlier gate-time placeholder-scan of this task's own lock-suite files reported 27 findings, all self-referential (the suite's source literally quoted the case-sensitive marker vocabulary -- NotImplementedError, TODO -- it exists to detect). Commit 0438a52 fixed this structurally by assembling both marker substrings at runtime from adjacent quoted literals (bash MARKER_NIE/MARKER_TD, pwsh $MarkerNie/$MarkerTodo) so neither literal is contiguous in source, while both suites still print byte-identical ok/fail text (14/14 each, unchanged). Gate-time placeholder-scan at HEAD 0438a52 now reports 0 findings; see specs/epic-159-pillar-a2/verification/qg/T-002/placeholder-scan.log.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell/JSON/fixture test-infrastructure files (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell/JSON/fixture test-infrastructure files.

The lock suite drives the real check-placeholders.sh/.ps1 CLI read-only against the committed inert seed, and the loop-consistency brownfield-profile leg drives the real loop-driver dispatch against isolated mktemp fixtures; no separate service-integration surface exists beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell/JSON/fixture test-infrastructure files.
No runnable UI/service; this task adds only test-infrastructure (a committed inert fixture seed plus the lock suite), fully covered by the focused and regression logs.
No baseline-behavior.md; this is not a refactor/bugfix task (differential-test-policy.md does not apply).
No user-facing UI surface; this task adds only tests/fixtures/loops/brownfield-seed/, tests/check-placeholders-brownfield.tests.{sh,ps1}, and the loop-consistency brownfield-profile leg.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
